chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.105 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For orders on MA No.442/2026. For hearing of main case. 08.04.2026 Mr. Masood Rasool Babar Memon advocate for petitioners The petitioners pray for quashment of FIR No.08/2026 registered at P.S. B-Section, Latifabad, Hyderabad for offences under sections 506, 337-H, 147, 148, 149 and 504 PPC. In our view, as and when a challan is filed in the aforesaid case, the petitioners will have an alternate remedy in the form of sections 249-A/265-K Cr.P.C., as the case may be. No exceptional circumstances have been narrated to quash the FIR in constitutional jurisdiction. Therefore, petition is dismissed with the observation that the petitioner may avail aforesaid remedy before the trial Court. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
